title: andrachne fruticosa var. orbicularis
intro: Andrachne fruticosa var. orbicularis, also known as the Orbicular Andrachne, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Andrachne fruticosa plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Andrachne fruticosa var. orbicularis are believed to include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal properties.
